Title: DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC_WITH_META
Feature: DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC_WITH_META(service, query, dflt_graph, named_graphs, req_hdr, maxrows, bnode_dict, metadata, resultset)
Description: Remote execution of SPARQL via SPARQL protocol. Fills in output parameters with metadata (like exec metadata) and a vector of vector s of 'long valmode' values.
Remote execution of SPARQL via SPARQL protocol. Fills in output parameters with metadata (like exec metadata) and a vector of vector s of 'long valmode' values.
